description: This file serves as an adapter for bookmark persistence in a multiverse explorer project, implementing fallback mechanisms between MySQL and in-memory storage depending on configuration and availability.

methods.name: upsertBookmark({ userId, bookmarkType, bookmarkKey, payload = null })
methods.description: Insert or update a bookmark, using MySQL if available, otherwise falling back to in-memory storage.

methods.name: deleteBookmark({ userId, bookmarkType, bookmarkKey })
methods.description: Delete a bookmark from the database or in-memory fallback.

methods.name: listBookmarks({ userId, bookmarkType = null, limit = 200, offset = 0 })
methods.description: Retrieve a list of bookmarks, preferring MySQL results but falling back to in-memory storage if needed.

ctags.name: deleteBookmark
ctags.pattern: /^export async function deleteBookmark({ userId, bookmarkType, bookmarkKey }) {$/

ctags.name: listBookmarks
ctags.pattern: /^export async function listBookmarks({ userId, bookmarkType = null, limit = 200, offset = 0 }) {$/

ctags.name: upsertBookmark
ctags.pattern: /^export async function upsertBookmark({ userId, bookmarkType, bookmarkKey, payload = null }) {$/
